creator: mark@rootbsd.net
text:
Hello,

RootBSD is a Internet hosting company that provides hosting services for BSD offerings.  We specialize in FreeBSD VPS by using jails.  We are donating many free jails to developers in the FreeBSD community, I would be glad to give you a list of those if you would like.  We would very much appreciate a link from the "Internet Service Providers" listing to our website at www.rootbsd.net.

Thank you,

Mark
